design_plan: rng=42; AIDA: attention via centered hero, interest via workflow steps, desire via cache reuse examples, action via CTA; hero math: max-width 1120px, clamp typography for 2–3 lines; bento density proof: compare-grid and bento use grid-auto-flow:dense; label sweep: competitors named; button contrast check: black/white pills on paper background.
headline: Computer-use cache for AI agents running repeated workflows

site_brief.audience: builders and operators who need repeated computer-use automations to get cheaper and more reliable
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Computer-use cache', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful.
site_brief.title: Computer-use cache
site_brief.use_case_intent: explain Super's computer-use cache as the reusable memory layer for repeated browser and desktop workflows

summary: An indexable, builder-focused use-case page explaining how Super’s computer-use cache makes repeated browser and desktop automations cheaper, faster, and more reliable — with real computer control, reusable action traces, and clear operator safeguards.
